title: helichrysum artemisioides var. artemisioides
intro: Helichrysum artemisioides var. artemisioides, also known as the Australian willow-herb, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Helichrysum artemisioides var. artemisioides include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Helichrysum artemisioides var. artemisioides can be prepared as an herbal tea, infused oil, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine practices.
